finalV04.reason: The primary v0.6 final panel did not complete before its deadline.

gateDecision.reason: Simulation-only v0.7+RAWS research output; owner review and committed-default acceptance remain required.

partialFinalV06AtDeadline.note: Completed contiguous checkpoint subshards only; excluded from the terminal target gate.

requested.qualification: Experimental fixed-template evaluation with behavior-changing environment permitted and recorded; not official v0.7 evidence, acceptance, bake, or release authorization.

serverTurnCircuitDiagnostic.qualification: M4 Max replay at concurrency 12 with per-turn audit enabled; diagnostic, not production-host certification.

independentDraftWin.note: Independent draft-policy win; it does not qualify either fight candidate.
